title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Direct

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Direct
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Direct in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Direct:
ICICI Direct is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct!
